bg.$description: color used by the card component for background.

fg.$description: color used by the card component for foreground.

border-color.$description: color used by the card component for border color.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the card component for border width.

radius.$description: dimension used by the card component for radius.

elevation.$description: Card resting elevation: MarsUI elevation ramp level e1 (brief §5, drop 0/1/1/-0.5 in the scheme shadow color; replaces the migrated M2-era shadow).

gap.$description: dimension used by the card component for gap.

media-padding.$description: dimension used by the card component for media padding.

header-padding.$description: dimension used by the card component for header padding.

body-padding.$description: dimension used by the card component for body padding.

footer-padding.$description: dimension used by the card component for footer padding.
